metadata.title:
TO CONSIDER
ROAD BONDS


At MEETING

One Weeks Delay in Gather
ing by Good Roads


Association.

pages.raw_text:
The meeting Of the Good Roads
Association, which was to have been
held in the Assembly rooms of the
Chamber of Commerce on Monday
night, January 10, has been post.
poned to Tuesday, January 10. A
telegram received this morning by
}. A. Perry, secretary Of the spo-
kane County Good Roads Associa-
ton, from L. Frank Brown, an.
nounces the inability Of the speak.
ers to attend the meeting at that
time.


Mr.. Brown advises that on Tues
day, January 10, Governor Hay
and Sam Hill, both prominent In
the good roads movement in thi9
state, will attend the meeting ana
have something of interest to say
AS the matter of bonding the coupr
ties will be one of the chief feat
ures of the open discussion it Is en-
pected that the meeting will be one
of exceptional interest.


Secretary Perry said today that
those who had received invitationa
would appreciate the added interest,"
which the presence of the governor
and Sam Hill would add to tho
meeting and while the county as
ISOLATION regretted the necessity Of
postponement, the general publi9
and those interested in the move
ment would profit by the change
and would appreciate the added I'M
terest given by the presence o4
such prominent men.
